label: Busy weekday
description: Fast, low-mess, and realistic around work or classes.

label: Lazy Sunday
description: A little more indulgent with time for one special dish.

label: Month-end budget
description: Maximize pantry reuse and control every rupee.

label: Friends coming over
description: More impressive but still compact-kitchen friendly.

value: Comfort food, but not too heavy
label: Comforting, not too heavy
description: Warm meals with balance and no food coma.

label: Spice and crunch
description: Sharper flavours and stronger texture contrast.

label: High-protein and filling
description: Keep meals more sustaining for long days or workouts.

label: Confident beginner
description: Comfortable with multitasking and quick prep.

label: Fast home cook
description: Ready for better batching and sharper timing.

label: Vegetarian with eggs
description: Prioritise veg but allow eggs for convenience and protein.

label: High-protein vegetarian
description: Use dairy, lentils, and soy more intentionally.

label: Chicken allowed
description: Include chicken when it improves value or flavour.
